text:
NCDPD DataQ™ 

VALUES: Y = Yes, pharmacy offers e-prescribing. 
N = No, pharmacy does not offer e-prescribing. 
Null/missing = This information has not been reported by the provider. 

COMMENT: This variable is new in 2012. 

Additional details regarding the National Council for Prescription Drug Programs (NCPDP) source data 
are available at: http://dataq.ncpdp.org/.
